layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Control Room Grid. High density, structural grayscale hierarchy. Minimal negative space inside data widgets.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tight padding for data (p-2, p-4), generous margins between structural sections (p-8).

grid.dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-4 lg:gap-6
grid.side_panel: col-span-1 md:col-span-4 lg:col-span-4 h-[calc(100vh-theme(spacing.20))] sticky top-20 border-l border-border pl-6 overflow-y-auto

components_strategy.cards: Cardless design. Flat white backgrounds with 1px solid border-border. No shadows. Sharp corners (rounded-none).
components_strategy.buttons: Square corners. Primary buttons are solid black. Secondary buttons are transparent with 1px black border.
components_strategy.tables: Dense. border-collapse. border-b border-border on rows. Hover: bg-zinc-50.
components_strategy.charts: Recharts. Use sharp monochromatic bars or lines, with Signal Red / Warning Yellow exclusively for data anomalies (absences/lateness).
components_strategy.navigation: Top fixed nav bar, backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, 1px bottom border. Include persistent admin session status.
components_strategy.badges: Sharp rectangular badges. Red for absence, Yellow for delay, Zinc for on-time.

motion_and_interactions.hover: High contrast hover states. Buttons: hover:bg-zinc-800. Rows: hover:bg-zinc-100.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Fast, mechanical transitions. transition-all duration-150 ease-linear.
motion_and_interactions.loaders: Stark monochrome spinners or linear progress bars.

login_background.description: Minimalist Swiss graphic design poster style background for the login page.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'lucide-react' for crisp, technical icons.
Implement Recharts for attendance trends (bars for daily presence, lines for trends).
Use standard Shadcn UI components but override border-radius to '0' (rounded-none) and remove box-shadows globally in Tailwind config for the Swiss Brutalist feel.
Build the dashboard layout with a 12-column grid. The main content spans 8 columns, and the Excel Viewer Side Panel spans 4 columns on the right.
Ensure 'login_background' image is used in the login page with a dark overlay to maintain text readability.
Use the configured 'destructive' red and 'warning' yellow specifically for highlighting 'Faltas' (Absences) and 'Retardos' (Delays) in tables and charts.
Implement data-testid on all key elements (login-button, excel-upload-input, export-pdf-button, update-check-button, etc.).
Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for all data tables to ensure numbers align perfectly.
Implement a sticky sidebar for the Excel viewer to allow users to scroll through the table while keeping the Excel data visible.
